calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jan-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Fallon, via ZOOM, for Janina Hoskins, Administrator.

The court advises counsel that it is unclear whether the instant petition is procedurally correct, but that the court is inclined to grant it. The court confirms with counsel that he has nothing to add.

The Petition to Terminate Estate is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Sep-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Fallon, via ZOOM, for Janina Hopkins, Personal Representative; Elyse Cheatham, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court begins by asking counsel regarding why no papers have been filed in this case. Mr. Fallon reports that the only asset of the estate is real property which is currently in foreclosure. Ms. Cheatham then reports that she is the daughter of the decedent and that she believes that no efforts have been made to contact her regarding this estate. The court instructs Mr. Fallon to file a petition to approve status which should include proof of his due diligence to notify any potential heirs.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 9, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Fallon for Petitioner.

The Court noted that the Petitioner is the Bankruptcy Trustee, stated that it has questions/concerns about bond, and that although she is bonded in the bankruptcy matter this is a different estate and presumably different assets are involved. Mr. Fallon stated that he has no problem with getting a bond, that the bond should be for half of the value of the home, that he believes it is in the million dollar range and that they have the fair market value of the property at $1,625,000.00. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $813,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for July 29, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Continued To Jan-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
